sentences.target: Je feuillette un magazine dans le salon.

translations.fr: Je feuillette un magazine dans le salon.
translations.en: I'm flipping through a magazine in the living room.
translations.es: Estoy hojeando una revista en la sala de estar.
translations.de: Ich blättere in einer Zeitschrift im Wohnzimmer.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在客厅翻看一本杂志。
translations.yue: 我喺客廳度翻睇一本雜誌。
translations.pt: Estou folheando uma revista na sala de estar.
translations.vi: Tôi đang lật xem một cuốn tạp chí trong phòng khách.
translations.ar: أنا أتصفح مجلة في غرفة المعيشة.
translations.nl: Ik blader door een tijdschrift in de woonkamer.
translations.hi: मैं बैठक में एक पत्रिका पलट रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg blar i et magasin i stuen.
translations.id: Saya sedang membolak-balik sebuah majalah di ruang tamu.
translations.sv: Jag bläddrar i en tidning i vardagsrummet.
translations.da: Jeg bladrer i et magasin i stuen.
translations.ja: リビングで雑誌をめくっています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; syntactic subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive action of browsing/leafing through something.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of the noun 'magazine'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'feuillette'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'salon'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'dans', expressing location.

sentences.target: Tu poses le magazine sur la table.
sentences.reading: /ty poz lə maɡazin syʁ la tabl/

translations.fr: Tu poses le magazine sur la table.
translations.ipa: /ty poz lə maɡazin syʁ la tabl/
translations.en: You put the magazine on the table.
translations.es: Pones la revista sobre la mesa.
translations.de: Du legst die Zeitschrift auf den Tisch.
translations.pt: Você coloca a revista na mesa.
translations.he: אתה מניח את המגזין על השולחן.
translations.vi: Bạn đặt tạp chí lên bàn.
translations.nl: Je legt het tijdschrift op tafel.
translations.hi: तुम पत्रिका मेज़ पर रखते हो.
translations.el: Βάζεις το περιοδικό πάνω στο τραπέζι.
translations.id: Kamu meletakkan majalah di atas meja.
translations.ja: 雑誌をテーブルの上に置く。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes a direct object and a prepositional complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'magazine'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'poses'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'table'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'sur', indicating location.

sentences.target: On achète ce magazine au kiosque.

translations.fr: On achète ce magazine au kiosque.
translations.en: We buy this magazine at the newsstand.
translations.es: Compramos esta revista en el quiosco.
translations.de: Wir kaufen diese Zeitschrift am Kiosk.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在报摊买这本杂志。
translations.yue: 我哋喺報攤買呢本雜誌。
translations.ru: Мы покупаем этот журнал в киоске.
translations.pt: Nós compramos esta revista na banca de jornal.
translations.he: אנחנו קונים את המגזין הזה בדוכן העיתונים.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi mua tạp chí này ở sạp báo.
translations.ar: نحن نشتري هذه المجلة من كشك الصحف.
translations.nl: We kopen dit tijdschrift bij de kiosk.
translations.uk: Ми купуємо цей журнал у кіоску.
translations.hu: Ezt a magazint az újságosnál vesszük.
translations.hi: हम यह पत्रिका स्टॉल से खरीदते हैं.
translations.el: Αγοράζουμε αυτό το περιοδικό από το περίπτερο.
translations.nb: Vi kjøper dette magasinet i kiosken.
translations.id: Kami membeli majalah ini di kios koran.
translations.sv: Vi köper den här tidningen i kiosken.
translations.ro: Cumpărăm această revistă de la chioșc.
translations.da: Vi køber dette magasin i kiosken.
translations.ja: 私たちはこの雑誌を売店で買います。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/personal subject pronoun; here generic 'one' or colloquial 'we'; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, selecting a direct object and a locative complement.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; deictic determiner of 'magazine'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'achète'.
Contraction of the preposition 'à' and the definite article 'le' (à + le); introduces a locative complement.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'au', indicating location.

sentences.target: J'aime lire ce magazine chaque matin.

translations.fr: J'aime lire ce magazine chaque matin.
translations.en: I like reading this magazine every morning.
translations.es: Me gusta leer esta revista cada mañana.
translations.de: Ich lese diese Zeitschrift jeden Morgen gern.
translations.it: Mi piace leggere questa rivista ogni mattina.
translations.ko: 매일 아침 이 잡지를 읽는 것을 좋아해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我喜欢每天早上读这本杂志。
translations.yue: 我鍾意每日朝早睇呢本雜誌。
translations.ru: Мне нравится читать этот журнал каждое утро.
translations.pt: Gosto de ler esta revista todas as manhãs.
translations.he: אני אוהב לקרוא את המגזין הזה בכל בוקר.
translations.tr: Her sabah bu dergiyi okumayı seviyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi thích đọc tạp chí này mỗi sáng.
translations.ar: أحب قراءة هذه المجلة كل صباح.
translations.nl: Ik lees dit tijdschrift graag elke ochtend.
translations.uk: Мені подобається читати цей журнал щоранку.
translations.hu: Szeretem minden reggel elolvasni ezt a magazint.
translations.hi: मुझे हर सुबह यह पत्रिका पढ़ना पसंद है.
translations.pl: Lubię czytać to czasopismo każdego ranka.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει να διαβάζω αυτό το περιοδικό κάθε πρωί.
translations.nb: Jeg liker å lese dette magasinet hver morgen.
translations.id: Saya suka membaca majalah ini setiap pagi.
translations.sv: Jag gillar att läsa den här tidningen varje morgon.
translations.ro: Îmi place să citesc această revistă în fiecare dimineață.
translations.cs: Rád čtu tento časopis každé ráno.
translations.da: Jeg kan godt lide at læse dette magasin hver morgen.
translations.fi: Pidän tämän aikakauslehden lukemisesta joka aamu.
translations.ja: 毎朝この雑誌を読むのが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Cliticized form of the personal subject pronoun 'je' before a vowel-initial verb; subject of 'aime'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects an infinitival complement ('lire').
Infinitive verb functioning as a non-finite complement (xcomp) of 'aime'; takes 'ce magazine' as its direct object.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'magazine'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'lire'.
Quantifying determiner used with a singular noun; modifies 'matin' to express habitual frequency.
Common noun, masculine; temporal noun functioning as an adverbial complement indicating time/frequency.
